titleStmt.title: SII 29.166: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 166. (A.R. No. B. 589 of 1961-62.) MALLIGIMAḌUVU, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup near the Iśvara temple.

It refers to the grants of land, 9 house sites and a garden to the main deity of the temple by Puḷiyamma and the 32 (mahājanas) of Malligemaḍuvu. Probably the grant was made over to Padumaṇabhaṭarāya. It mentions brati paṭṭa-Maṇisiva-Gorava. It also refers to a grant of 2 mattar land to Nāgiyabbe.

In the date portion the cyclic year Rudhirōdagāri, the month Śrāvaṇa and Saturday are mentioned. The details are insufficient for verification. It is in characters of the 10th century A.D. The cyclic year Rudhirōdgari occurred twice in that century viz., Śaka 825 903 A.D. and Śaka 885 963 A.D., July and August.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī rudhirōdgāri sambatsara prava
rttise śrāvaṇa māsado diyu sanivārada
ndu malligemaḍuvina puḷiyammanu mavatirvvaruyidu
mūlastānadadēva padimūṟu malkeyya Oṁmbattu maneya nivēśaṇa
paḍuvatōṇṭa padumaṇabhaṭa rāyarige piriya brati paṭṭa maṇisiva goravara tāḻuva
nāgiyabbege koṭṭakeyi Irmmattar Idavaḻidō vāraṇāsili kavileyanaḻida
Digital edition of SII 29.166 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
